channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Unusual Negotiations with Erdogan
item.description: Unlike Caribbean ship-targeting gangs, groups backed by Turkey's leader engage in federally defined terrorism.

item.title: Putin Has Lost the War in Ukraine
item.description: The only question is what the endgame will look like.

item.title: A Roman Empire Second Wind Sweeps Montreal
item.description: The Torlonia Collection of ancient Roman sculpture ends its triumphant North American tour at the cityâs Museum of Fine Arts.

item.title: Did Life Begin on Mars?
item.description: Steve Bennerâs Meet the Neighbors makes some bold and fascinating claims.
